name: Sarah Chen
bio: Met in university during freshman orientation. We bonded over late-night study sessions and terrible cafeteria food. Now she's a brilliant UX designer in San Francisco.

name: Marcus Johnson
bio: My first manager at TechCorp who taught me how to navigate the corporate world without losing myself. We grab coffee every couple of weeks.

name: Olivia Martinez
bio: My cousin who lives across the country in Miami. We share a love for travel and have a tradition of visiting a new country together every year.

name: Tom Baker
bio: My workout buddy from the local climbing gym. He got me into bouldering two years ago and we now compete in local events together.

name: Aisha Patel
bio: We met at a hackathon in 2019 and immediately clicked over our shared obsession with data visualization. She now leads a data science team at a healthcare startup.

name: Ryan O'Brien
bio: Known him since we were 7 years old. We grew up on the same street and despite living in different cities now, we video call every Sunday.

name: Lisa Nakamura
bio: Met at a product conference in NYC. She's a brilliant product strategist and has given me invaluable career advice. I keep meaning to reach out more often.

name: David Kim
bio: My neighbor and go-to guy for everything from debugging code to fixing leaky faucets. We have a weekly board game night with a small group.
